issues.description: KanbanPanel drag-drop status mutation inserts an activity_event but does not handle insertion failure gracefully - the UI update proceeds even if the activity event write fails.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Drag-drop status changes now persist to Supabase and create activity_event records. This pattern should be followed for any future status mutation surfaces.

summary: Upgraded KanbanPanel with company-scoped queries, seven Paperclip workflow columns, explicit assignee/unassigned states, and drag-drop status persistence with activity event logging. ActionLogPanel Activity tab now shows live Supabase activity_events with agent filtering. 5 new tests cover company scoping, assignee display, and foreign-company exclusion. Browser verification confirmed all 7 columns render correctly.
